description: Jansen Teng discusses the evolution of virtual agents and their integration into consumer-facing applications, emphasizing the need for foundational models to enhance autonomous capabilities. He highlights the potential of AI frameworks and the importance of tokenization in creating better user interfaces.
topic_summary: Exploration of virtual agents' rise in the crypto-AI space, addressing foundational models, consumer interaction, and the future of AI technologies [t=0:16 - t=209:88].
